Zucchini savory bread

Sep 10, 2017

Recently we had labor day weekend in the States, which marked the end of summer fun. Though I was quite hesitant to roam around this time, hubby dear insisted to go outdoors. It was all fun and the budding kiddo seems to enjoy the nature and especially the water. Usually, when it’s a long weekend, I kind of laze around with less of cooking and it’s more of depending on the freezer meals which I’d keep pre-prepared. Although, it’s not always a healthy option, but is much better than anything outside which claims to be healthy and fresh.

Zucchini savory bread served in a plate

Honestly, I was never that serious about what I eat. It’s the pregnancy and the baby who played out a crucial role in manipulating and designing our family’s recent food habit. We thoroughly love to experiment on healthy option and are usually opting for fresh ingredients. As it’s summer we decided to bake a savory bread of zucchini and flavor it with all the ingredients we are growing in our little patio herb garden.

Ah!! The feeling of plucking and cooking it fresh in indescribable. Wish I had a backyard with a self sufficient garden. May be one day it will come true, but for the time being, let’s rush for this little delight. These days my little bunny has become a great help in the kitchen. Well, you all know which way?

Sigh!!

Here goes the Recipe for Savory Zucchini bread:

Who get’s this plate?

Ingredients:

  1. Zucchini - 1 large
  2. Jalapeno Hot pepper - 1 large
  3. Basil leaves - handful
  4. Spring Onions - 3
  5. Garlic - 2 large cloves
  6. Eggs - 3 large
  7. All Purpose Flour - 1 and 1/2 cup
  8. Granulated Sugar - 1 tbsp
  9. Salt - 1 tsp
  10. Baking Powder - 1 and 1/2 tsp
  11. Paprika - 1 tsp
  12. Olive Oil - 1/3 cup

  13. Grated Mozzarella Cheese - a handful

    Ingredients:  Basil, Zucchini, Garlic, Spring Onions and Jalapeno Hot Pepper

Steps of Preparation:

  1. Preheat the oven to 350 F or 180 deg Celsius.

  2. Grate the Zucchini and Garlic and strain the excess water out of it.

    Grated Zucchini

    Grating the Garlic Cloves

  3. Chop the basil leaves and spring onions.

    Chopping the Basil Leaves

    Chopping the Spring Onions

  4. Chop the Jalapeno and mix it with the rest all vegetables and herbs.

    Little hands playing with the veggies

  5. Beat the three eggs and add to the veggies.

    Eggs

  6. Sieve the dry ingredients and add the beaten egg to the mixture and fold gently the veggie mixture.

  7. Add the olive oil to the batter.

    The Batter

  8. Line the bread mold with a parchment paper and pour in the batter.

  9. Sprinkle the cheese for the extra delicious flavor and texture.

    Mold ready to go in the Oven

  10. Bake it for 30-35 mins.

    Straight out from oven

Once done serve it hot or cold and with a cup of coffee. It’s a true delight.

One more piece

Zucchini savory bread

Recipe Type: Breakfast

Cuisine: American

Author: Shreemaa Bhadra

Prep time: 30 mins

Cook time: 25 mins

Total time: 55 mins

Serves: 6

Zucchini Savory bread is a great recipe to include a variety of vegetables and herbs in your diet with a less effort of preparation.

Ingredients

Instructions
